title: Grilled Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A flavorful and tender dish featuring marinated Argentinian beef skewers grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, chimichurri sauce, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated beef cubes onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and garnish with chopped parsley.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
